name: headless-railway-cms-commerce-complete
description: Self-contained headless CMS, static frontend, themes, plugins and commerce platform for GitHub + Railway only.

scripts.test: node --check src/server.js && node --check src/core/store.js && node --check src/core/security.js && node --check src/core/http.js && node --check src/modules/auth.js && node --check src/modules/cms.js && node --check src/modules/commerce.js && node --check src/modules/platform.js && node --check src/modules/noMissing.js && node --check src/modules/integrations.js && node --check src/modules/performance.js && node --check src/build-static.js && node --check cli/cms.js
